name: construction contractors processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For construction contractors processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual entry of handwritten work orders causes late payments. We convert handwritten work orders into digital invoices instead of manual transcription.
problem_solved: manual entry of handwritten work orders leads to errors and delays in invoicing
features: manual entry of handwritten work orders
basic error checking for data entry

locked_fields.primary_problem: manual entry of handwritten work orders leads to errors and delays in invoicing
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For construction contractors processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual entry of handwritten work orders causes late payments. We convert handwritten work orders into digital invoices instead of manual transcription.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual transcription of handwritten work orders into invoicing software
must_have_features: manual entry of handwritten work orders
basic error checking for data entry

one_liner: For construction contractors processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual entry of handwritten work orders causes late payments. We convert handwritten work orders into digital invoices instead of manual transcription.
